queries.question: Select all magazines, their demographic groups and professional fields of their audience.
queries.sql: Select m.title, a.group_name, pf.field_name FROM Magazines m JOIN Demographic_Groups a on a.id = m.demographic_group_id JOIN Professional_Fields pf on pf.Field_id = m.Professional_Field_id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title ?group_name ?field_name WHERE {
  ?m a :Magazines .
  ?a a :Demographic_Groups .
  ?m p:hasDemographic_Groups ?a .
  ?pf a :Professional_Fields .
  ?m p:hasProfessional_Fields ?pf .
  ?m p:title ?title .
  ?a p:group_name ?group_name .
  ?pf p:field_name ?field_name .
}

queries.question: For each magazine list the readers, and their professional fields.
queries.sql: Select r.name, a.field_name FROM Readers r JOIN Magazines m ON m.magazine_id = r.preferred_magazine_id JOIN Professional_Fields a on a.Field_id = m.Professional_Field_id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?field_name WHERE {
  ?r a :Readers .
  ?m a :Magazines .
  ?r p:hasMagazines ?m .
  ?a a :Professional_Fields .
  ?m p:hasProfessional_Fields ?a .
  ?r p:name ?name .
  ?a p:field_name ?field_name .
}

queries.question: Show me the readers of different magazines and what category they fall into.
queries.sql: Select r.name, a.group_name FROM Readers r JOIN Demographic_Groups a on a.id = r.demographic_group_id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?group_name WHERE {
  ?r a :Readers .
  ?a a :Demographic_Groups .
  ?r p:hasDemographic_Groups ?a .
  ?r p:name ?name .
  ?a p:group_name ?group_name .
}

queries.question: Show me the readers of different magazines and what category they fall into.
queries.sql: Select r.name, a.group_name, pf.field_name FROM Readers r JOIN Demographic_Groups a on a.id = r.demographic_group_id JOIN Magazines m ON m.magazine_id = r.preferred_magazine_id  JOIN Professional_Fields pf on pf.Field_id = m.Professional_Field_id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?group_name ?field_name WHERE {
  ?r a :Readers .
  ?a a :Demographic_Groups .
  ?r p:hasDemographic_Groups ?a .
  ?m a :Magazines .
  ?r p:hasMagazines ?m .
  ?pf a :Professional_Fields .
  ?m p:hasProfessional_Fields ?pf .
  ?r p:name ?name .
  ?a p:group_name ?group_name .
  ?pf p:field_name ?field_name .
}
